detail.description:
★MU Monarch Hell Hunter Update★

▶ Hunt the strongest of Hell! Hell Hunter Open!

Powerful Hell Hunter BOSSes appearing at the time Hell opens!

Experience overwhelming battles and abundant rewards amidst the extreme hunts unfolding in the Hell Realm!

★Game Introduction★

▶ Brilliant Glory, the memories and emotions of MU Online 그대로!

The true return of MU! Be reborn as the strongest warrior once again!

Break through the darkness that has descended upon the MU Continent and save the world!

▶
